span.p:
BugTriageObservation
┌─────────────────────┐
│ task_id │
│ bug_report: │
│ title, body, │
│ labels, repo │
│ available_assignees │
│ step / max_steps │
└─────────────────────┘

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Agent (LLM) decides
Reads bug report,
reasons about it,
produces an action

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BugTriageAction
┌─────────────────────┐
│ Task 1: criticality │
│ Task 2: severity │
│ Task 3: root_cause │
│ + assignee │
│ confidence (0-1) │
│ reasoning (text) │
└─────────────────────┘

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Validate action
Check task_id matches,
required fields present

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Select grader by task_id
┌──────────────────────────┐
│ task_criticality: │
│ grade_criticality() │
│ Binary: 1.0 or 0.0 │
│ │
│ task_severity: │
│ grade_severity() │
│ Partial: 1.0/0.7/0.4 │
│ │
│ task_root_cause_assignee:│
│ grade_root_cause() │
│ Weighted: 0.6RC+0.4A │
└──────────────────────────┘

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
RewardCalculator.compute()
┌──────────────────────────┐
│ base_score (from grader) │
│ + confidence_bonus │
│ + reasoning_bonus │
│ + edge_case_bonus │
│ = total (clamped 0-1) │
└──────────────────────────┘

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BugTriageReward
┌──────────────────────────┐
│ base_score: 0.84 │
│ confidence_bonus: +0.08 │
│ reasoning_bonus: +0.05 │
│ edge_case_bonus: 0.0 │
│ total: 0.97 │
└──────────────────────────┘

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Final Score
Average of all
episode rewards

BugGroundTruth
